# Plant Commerce — Full API & Data Guide

## Overview
Plant Commerce is a plant database and nursery inventory aggregator focused on permaculture crops. It provides structured data about plant species, cultivars (named varieties), and nursery inventory with pricing/availability.

Current scope: Hazelnuts (Corylus genus) — 7 species, 60+ cultivars, 10 nurseries.

## Data Model

### Plant Entity (Species)
A botanical species, hybrid, or species group.
Fields: id, slug, canonical_name, botanical_name, genus, family, entity_type, description.
Example: European Hazelnut = Corylus avellana.

### Cultivar
A named plant variety under a species. Types: cultivar_clone, named_seed_strain, breeding_population, geographic_population, species_seedling.
Fields: id, slug, canonical_name, plant_entity_id, material_type, breeder, origin_location, year_released, patent_status, notes.
Example: Jefferson = cultivar_clone under Corylus avellana, bred by Oregon State University.

### Nursery
A business that sells plants.
Fields: id, slug, name, website_url, location_city, location_state, location_country, sales_type, is_active.

### Inventory Offer
A current listing of a cultivar at a nursery.
Fields: nursery_id, cultivar_id, raw_product_name, raw_price_text, product_page_url, propagation_method, sale_form, offer_status.

## API Endpoints

All responses use envelope: { ok: true, data: ..., meta: { total }, links: { self, ... } }
Errors: { ok: false, error: { code, message } }

### GET /api
Returns JSON listing all available endpoints with descriptions and parameters.

### GET /api/search?q={query}&limit={n}
Full-text search across plants and cultivars.
- q (required): search term
- limit (optional, default 20): max results
Returns: { ok, data: [{ index_source, entity_id, slug, canonical_name, material_type, botanical_name, species_slug, active_offer_count }] }

### GET /api/plants/{speciesSlug}
Get species details with all cultivars.
Returns: { ok, data: { type: "plant_entity", data: {...}, cultivars: [...] } }
Example: /api/plants/corylus-avellana

### GET /api/plants/{speciesSlug}/{cultivarSlug}
Get cultivar with offers, aliases, legal identifiers.
Returns: { ok, data: { type: "cultivar", data: {...}, offers: [...], aliases: [...], legal_identifiers: [...] } }
Example: /api/plants/corylus-avellana/jefferson

### GET /api/nurseries
List all active nurseries.
Returns: { ok, data: [...], meta: { total } }

### GET /api/nurseries/{nurserySlug}
Get nursery with inventory.
Returns: { ok, data: { ...nursery, inventory: [...] }, meta: { total } }
Example: /api/nurseries/burnt-ridge-nursery

## URL Patterns
- Species pages: /plants/{species-slug} (e.g., /plants/corylus-avellana)
- Cultivar pages: /plants/{species-slug}/{cultivar-slug} (e.g., /plants/corylus-avellana/jefferson)
- Nursery pages: /nurseries/{nursery-slug} (e.g., /nurseries/burnt-ridge-nursery)

## Structured Data
All pages include JSON-LD (schema.org) structured data:
- Homepage: WebSite + SearchAction
- Species: ItemList of cultivars
- Cultivar: Product + Offer[]
- Nursery: Organization
- All: BreadcrumbList

## Search Tips
- Search by cultivar name: "jefferson", "barcelona"
- Search by species: "european hazelnut", "corylus avellana"
- Search by breeder: results include breeder info in cultivar details
- Partial matches work via trigram similarity

## Rate Limits
Be polite. No formal rate limit, but please keep requests under 1/second for API endpoints.
